layout.subtitle: Let's get your gateway up and running

complete.title: Setup Complete!
complete.ready: Your system is ready to go!
complete.description: Provider, agent, and channel have been configured. You can manage them anytime from the dashboard.

provider.title: Configure LLM Provider
provider.descriptionCli: Connect using your local Claude CLI installation. No API key needed.
provider.descriptionOauth: Sign in with your ChatGPT account to use your subscription through OAuth. No API key needed.
provider.description: Connect to an AI provider to power your agents. You'll need an API key.
provider.providerTypeHint: The LLM service you want to connect. OpenRouter is recommended for access to multiple models.
provider.name: Name
provider.nameHint: Internal identifier for this provider. Auto-generated from provider type.
provider.apiKeyHint: Your provider's secret key. Encrypted server-side and never exposed in API responses.
provider.apiBaseHint: The endpoint URL for API requests. Auto-filled based on provider type. Override only if using a custom proxy.

errors.oauthProviderNotFound: OAuth authentication succeeded, but the provider could not be found. Please try again.

model.title: Select & Verify Model
model.description: Choose a model and verify that your provider connection works.
model.modelHint: The AI model to use. Select from the list or type a model ID manually if not listed.
model.selectModel: Select or type a model ID
model.noModelsHint: This provider doesn't list models — type the model ID manually.
model.verificationFailed: Verification failed. Check your API key and model.

agent.title: Create Your First Agent
agent.description: An agent is your AI assistant. Customize its name and personality.
agent.displayNameHint: Will be auto-generated during summoning based on the agent personality.
agent.agentKeyHint: Unique identifier for the agent. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
agent.personalityHint: Describe your agent's role and behavior. AI will generate context files from this during summoning.
agent.personalityPlaceholder: Describe your agent's personality, purpose, and behavior...
agent.personalityHintBottom: Customize this prompt to shape your agent's personality and expertise.
agent.selfEvolveDesc: Allow agent to evolve its communication style over time via SOUL.md
agent.summoningFailed: Summoning failed. Please adjust your settings and try again.

channel.title: Connect a Channel
channel.description: Connect a messaging platform to your agent. You can always add channels later.
channel.channelTypeHint: The messaging platform to connect. E.g. Telegram, Discord, Zalo.
channel.name: Name
channel.nameHint: Internal identifier for this channel instance. Auto-generated from channel type.
channel.displayNameHint: A friendly name shown in the UI. Optional.
channel.credentialsHint: Encrypted server-side. Never returned in API responses.
